title: Conformance with building codes
doc_html:
§2351.22.  Conformance with building codes

All modifications to facilities or structures and to their component systems that may occur in conjunction with an abatement activity shall be designed in accordance with applicable state and municipal building codes.

Acts 1993, No. 224, §1.
